name: 格洛克18型 | 珊红花汛
nameZh: 格洛克18型 | 珊红花汛
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. A vintage pattern of roses over a coral pink base has been applied. LOL (lots of love), Grandma
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 枪身采用了珊瑚粉基底复古玫瑰涂装。 奶奶，aini.jpg
